title: Traditional Slovakian Beef Goulash
description: A hearty, comforting Slovakian dish made with rich beef broth and tender dumplings. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the paprika, caraway seeds, and flour to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually add the beef broth to the pot, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the dumplings to the pot and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until they are cooked through.
Season the goulash with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the goulash hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or dill if desired.
Enjoy with a side of crusty bread or a green salad.
